iot.jobtemplate.retrycriteria.CfnAbout: The criteria that determines how many retries are allowed for each failure type for a job.

iot.jobtemplate.retrycriteria.FailureTyp.Description: The type of job execution failures that can initiate a job retry.

iot.jobtemplate.retrycriteria.NumberOfRe.Description: The number of retries allowed for a failure type for the job.
